main_clinic.name: Family Medicine Center at University Village
main_clinic.address: 722 W Maxwell St, Suite 235, Chicago IL 60607
main_clinic.hours: Day, evening, weekend, and same-day appointments available. Call 8:30AM for same-day.
main_clinic.cost: Many services covered by Student Health Fee at no extra cost. Others billed to insurance.
main_clinic.note: Student Health Fee covers some care. Chronic disease, immunizations, lab tests may have additional cost.
main_clinic.insurance: Accepts wide range of insurance. Bring student ID and insurance card.

counseling_center.name: UIC Counseling Center
counseling_center.address: Suite 2010, Student Services Building, 1200 W Harrison St
counseling_center.cost: Free for students assessed the Health Services Fee, regardless of insurance
counseling_center.appointments: Call or walk in. Initial consultations up to 50 minutes, scheduled up to 2 weeks in advance.

campuscare.what_it_is: Affordable self-funded student health benefit program. Students are automatically enrolled unless they submit a waiver.
benefits: Physician, hospital, ER, behavioral health, prescription drug coverage
campuscare.waiver: Can waive if you have qualifying outside insurance. Save ~$697/year if eligible.
campuscare.spring_2026_dates: January 1, 2026 through May 17, 2026. Waiver deadline: February 7, 2026
campuscare.note: Must use CampusCare primary care provider and get referrals before specialty care for full coverage.

dental.name: UIC College of Dentistry
dental.note: Call for initial screening. CampusCare offers discounted dental through UHP Dental.

urgent_care.name: UI Health Mile Square Health Center
urgent_care.note: UIC-affiliated urgent care nearby. Family Medicine Center also offers same-day appointments for many urgent needs.

disability_resource_center.how_to_register: Start online or call. Schedule intake via iAdvise. Provisional accommodations may be available while documentation is gathered.

writing_center.services: Free for all UIC students. Helps with class assignments, research writing, personal statements, lab reports, resumes, applications.

math_science_learning_center.name: Math & Science Learning Center (MSLC)
math_science_learning_center.address: 845 W Taylor St, 3rd Floor (Science and Engineering South)

other_tutoring.name: Burnham Hall Tutoring Center
other_tutoring.notes: Honors peer tutors in sciences, social sciences, quantitative subjects, languages, writing

other_tutoring.name: Academic Support and Achievement Program
other_tutoring.notes: Applied Health Sciences and related courses

other_tutoring.name: Port Academic Center
other_tutoring.address: B60 Physical Education Building, 901 W Roosevelt Rd

career_services.walk_in: Wednesday in-person 12PM-2PM, Thursday virtual 2PM-4PM (verify by semester)
career_services.internships: Can be paid/unpaid, credit/non-credit, in corporate/nonprofit/government/clinical/research settings

registration.time_tickets: Your assigned date/time to start registering, based on credit hours completed. Graduate students go first, then seniors, juniors, sophomores, freshmen.
registration.how_to_register: Go to my.UIC.edu → Banner XE Registration → Register for Classes → Select term → Search courses → Add to summary → Submit
registration.waitlist: Available for select courses only. If seat opens, you get 24 hours to claim it via email. Miss it? You go back to bottom of waitlist.
registration.add_drop: During no-W period, make changes in XE. After that, contact college office. Max 4 W notations allowed during entire degree program.
registration.overrides: Course restrictions require contacting the department offering the course or your college advisor.

academic_policies.academic_notice: Placed on academic notice if cumulative or UIC GPA falls below 2.00. Dean sets conditions (course restrictions, hour limits). Dismissed if still below 2.00 after notice.

graduation_requirements.minimum_gpa: 2.00 in all UIC work, in the major, and in combined transfer+UIC work
graduation_requirements.gen_ed: At least 24 semester hours across 6 gen ed categories. Writing proficiency via ENGL 160 and 161.
graduation_requirements.advanced_coursework: Many programs require 40+ hours of 200-level and above coursework
graduation_requirements.residency: Generally 30+ hours at UIC. Often majority of major must be completed at UIC.

academic_policies.deans_list: College-specific. Common pattern: 3.50 term GPA with at least 12 semester hours.

latin_honors.note: Based on UIC GPA only, not combined transfer GPA

honors_college.units_required: 18 Honors units for first-year entrants (prorated for transfers)
honors_college.to_join_as_current_student: Need 3.40 GPA and at least 4 semesters remaining

grading_scale.note: W, I, CR, NC, NR, DFR do not count in GPA

academic_policies.grade_replacement: Courses with A or B may NOT be repeated. D or F may be repeated once without permission. All attempts stay on transcript.
academic_policies.incomplete_grade: I must be removed within 1 calendar year. If not completed, I becomes F for undergrads.
academic_policies.withdrawal_limit: Max 4 individual course withdrawals (W notations) during entire degree program.
academic_policies.double_major: One bachelor's degree with two majors. No extra hours required but both major requirements must be completed. Not allowed with substantial overlap. Some colleges prohibit it (e.g., College of Education).
academic_policies.changing_major: Contact the appropriate college office. For intercollege transfer, contact college you want to enter.
